meta.title: Hoosier Ticket Command Center
meta.subtitle: Halftime Glizzy's Ledger · one account, four tracked funds
meta.privacyWarning: This package contains real financial data. Keep the workbook and JSON private.
meta.sourceOfTruth: Excel workbook in OneDrive remains the source of truth until Microsoft Graph writeback is live.
meta.delivery: GitHub Pages / hosted static app + Microsoft Graph / OneDrive workbook target

current.note: 2026 is currently square after applying 2025 carry-in balances and cash paid for seats. New 2026 sales/purchases will change these balances.

formerMembers.Note: Seth owned the fourth seat through 2025; Dennis picked up the second seat in 2026.

historical.dashboardNote: Active dashboard values come from the 2026 workbook: after applying 2025 fund balances and 2026 cash payments, all active 2026 balances are $0.00 until new 2026 sales/purchases are entered.
historical.priorBugNote: Earlier hosted prototype incorrectly displayed a lifetime/historical transaction rollup as the current account balance; it also counted opening balances and purchases in the same total. This v2 separates current active balance from historical activity.

seatAccounts.Notes: Replaces fourth seat / Dennis x 2 in 2026
